chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Misc. Application No.1174 of 2024 Muhammad Shoaib Khan vs. The State & others 21.01.2025. Applicant in person Mr. Faheem Hussain, APG O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant filed an application u/s 22-A & B Cr.PC for registration of FIR against five unknown accused for entering his house and trying to dispossess him. This application has been dismissed vide impugned order. Applicant is present, who has not pointed out any illegality in the same order. 2. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed along with pending application(s) being without merits, however, the applicant may be provided protection in accordance with law. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
